creator: jeroen@vangelderen.org
text:
The deskutils/xwrits port is outdated/broken:
- the ports is version 2.11 and the latest xwrits is 2.15;
- the tarball has moved to a different website.

Fix: 

Commit the patch at:
http://jeroen.vangelderen.org/~gelderen/xwrits.diff

The patch updates the port to the latest xwrits (2.15) 
and chases the tarball location.
